title: RiceMotd
body:
![Supported Core](https://img.shields.io/badge/Supported%20Core-Spigot|Folia-blue)
![Supported Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Supported%20Version-1.7.x--26.x-blue)
![Paid/Free](https://img.shields.io/badge/Paid/Free-Free-blue)
![Latest Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fricedoc.handyplus.cn%2Fversion.json&query=%24.RiceMotd&prefix=v&label=Latest%20Version)

### 1. Introduction

> RiceMotd —— A pretty useful MOTD plugin!

### 2. Features

1. Easily configure dynamic MOTD and dynamic server icons
2. Supports RGB colors
3. Enables maintenance mode toggle
4. Supports MiniMessage (2.0.0+)
5. Supports BungeeCord(3.0.0+)

### 3. [Usage Statistics](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/RiceMotd/18406)

![RiceMotd](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/RiceMotd.svg)
